ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current health status of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students in the school */,
  "total_staff" INTEGER /* Total number of staff in the school */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the school's health status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "student_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student case record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school where the cases were reported */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed student cases */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the cases were reported */,
  "student_grade" TEXT /* Grade level of the student */,
  "student_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the student */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the student */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the student recovered */,
  "isolation_status" TEXT /* Isolation status of the student */,
  "source_of_infection" TEXT /* Source of infection for the student */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_student_cases_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff case record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school where the cases were reported */,
  "confirmed_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed staff cases */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the cases were reported */,
  "staff_department" TEXT /* Department of the staff member */,
  "staff_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the staff member */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the staff member */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the staff member recovered */,
  "isolation_status" TEXT /* Isolation status of the staff member */,
  "source_of_infection" TEXT /* Source of infection for the staff member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_cases_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "class_closures" (
  "closure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each closure record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school where the closure occurred */,
  "closure_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the class closure */,
  "date_closed" TEXT /* Date when the class was closed */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "grade_level" TEXT /* Grade level of the class */,
  "reopen_date" TEXT /* Expected date when the class will reopen */,
  "number_of_affected_students" INTEGER /* Number of students affected by the closure */,
  "number_of_affected_staff" INTEGER /* Number of staff affected by the closure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("closure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_class_closures_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, health officer) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the report pertains to */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the health status and cases */,
  "number_of_student_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed student cases in the report */,
  "number_of_staff_cases" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed staff cases in the report */,
  "number_of_class_closures" INTEGER /* Number of class closures in the report */,
  "total_students_affected" INTEGER /* Total number of students affected by health incidents */,
  "total_staff_affected" INTEGER /* Total number of staff affected by health incidents */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
